source: Kim 2008 reference — hyponatremia increases score vs MELD 21
Sodium above cap (137) — clamped; no sodium penalty
Normal sodium — sodium diff = 0; equals MELD
Sodium at upper boundary — no penalty; equals MELD
Sodium at lower boundary — maximum penalty
Extreme labs + max hyponatremia — capped at 40
Mild labs + normal sodium — equals MELD
